name_en: Chanel 24C Double Gold Ball AS2649: Went inside to see the seasonal model. The cute SA told me the most popular double gold ball mini is here. Let's do a comparison. Size: Two are almost the same, both are super practical sizes! Can hold a phone, keys, card holder, makeup, etc. Super practical! The double gold ball mini is slightly thicker, but the actual capacity is about the same. Material: Both are cowhide, durable but the hand feel is completely different. The previous cat-eye season model is softer (my favorite texture), more casual and relaxed. I always feel Chanel should be this kind of lazy, casual, exquisite double gold ball. The new one is stiffer, the leather is slightly more shiny, and the side looks more like a Boy bag. Square, because this one is stiffer, so even though it's thicker than the season model, the capacity is actually about the same. I prefer the soft cowhide of the season model for the texture. Chain: The double gold ball chain is slightly thinner, probably for easier pulling. Length is more adjustable! Size: 22×14.5×8cm
